title: HOMESOURCE - 211info
text: WARM SPRINGS OFFICE HOMESOURCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers first-time home ownership classes, counseling, financial literacy classes, individualized financial coaching, credit counseling, down payment assistance loans, reverse mortgage counseling, mortgage payment assistance, help with property taxes, asset building, matched savings programs known as Individual Development Accounts, and low-interest, payment-deferred home rehabilitation loans. 1144 Warm Springs Street Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 553-0497 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 553-0497 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by program. Many services are no cost. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs Services: Credit Counseling Financial Literacy Training Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Home Rehabilitation Programs Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling Individual Development Accounts Reverse Mortgage Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LENDING MONEY MANAGEMENT - REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WARM SPRINGS OFFICE
